signupData.goalsElaboration: General strength and fitness - jack of all trades. Be ready for anything: hiking, sports, challenges. No specific timeline, ongoing development. Likes variety.
signupData.locationElaboration: Crunch Fitness - full commercial gym equipment
signupData.experienceElaboration: 3 years consistent training. General fitness enthusiast, no specific sport. Squat 245x5, bench 205x5, deadlift 315x5, 5K in 25 min. Enjoys mix of strength, conditioning, and skills. Mon/Wed/Fri/Sat at noon, 60 min.

onboardingMessages: I just want to be strong and capable for whatever life throws at me - hiking, pickup sports, random physical challenges. Jack of all trades.
I go to Crunch Fitness 4 days a week at lunch, about 60 minutes. They have everything.
I get bored with monotonous programming - I like mixing strength, conditioning, and skill work like handstands. Keep it interesting.
